codeReview.summary: The metadata accessor additions are straightforward and the mocked coverage is solid, but the live smoke does not actually guarantee the default-host behavior required by the feature.

issues.description: `OpenAI::builder().build()` still honors `OPENAI_BASE_URL` from the environment, so this smoke can pass against any alternate compatible host if that variable is set. Because the test never clears or asserts the resolved base URL, it does not itself prove the required default-host (`api.openai.com/v1`) integration.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `sdk-core-worker` skill requires `brainstorming` before changing shared public API shape, but worker sessions in non-interactive Exec Mode cannot satisfy the brainstorming approval gate literally.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/staticpayload/Mainframe/openai-rust/.factory/skills/sdk-core-worker/SKILL.md requires `brainstorming`; the handoff for worker session 7f6f5b1f-dd3d-4dd5-b1a8-3794671c78b7 records `skillFeedback.followedProcedure = false` and explains the Exec Mode deviation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission shared-state docs do not note that default-host live proofs must clear `OPENAI_BASE_URL`, even though that env var overrides the host and can invalidate a default-host smoke.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/staticpayload/Mainframe/openai-rust/.factory/library/environment.md documents `OPENAI_BASE_URL` as an optional override and only prescribes `set -a && . ./creds.txt && set +a && <command>` for live tests; the worker's recorded live verification command had to add `unset OPENAI_BASE_URL` manually to make the smoke meaningful.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, skill, and commit diff. Metadata/raw-response accessors look correct, but the live smoke is insufficient as written because it can silently validate a custom `OPENAI_BASE_URL` instead of the required default OpenAI host.
